### The Benefits of Holistic Integrated Healthcare

![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/ae0796df/dms3rep/multi/opt/esketamine-treatment-orlando-florida-1920w.jpg)

What is Holistic Integrated Healthcare?

Holistic integrated healthcare is an approach to healthcare that focuses on the whole person. It looks at the body, mind, and spirit as one interconnected system, rather than treating individual symptoms or illnesses. Holistic integrated healthcare is based on the understanding that the body has an innate ability to heal itself and that the body, mind, and spirit must be in balance in order to achieve optimal health. Holistic practitioners use a variety of techniques to help the body heal itself, including nutrition, exercise, stress management, and lifestyle changes.

Benefits of Holistic Integrated Healthcare

Holistic integrated healthcare has many benefits, including: 

Improved Quality of Life -
Holistic integrated healthcare focuses on improving overall health and quality of life, rather than simply treating individual symptoms or illnesses. This approach can help reduce stress, improve sleep, and increase energy levels. It can also help reduce the risk of chronic illnesses such as heart disease, diabetes, and cancer. 

Holistic Approach to Health -
This approach can help to identify underlying causes of illness and provide a comprehensive treatment plan that addresses physical, mental, emotional, and spiritual aspects of health. 

Preventative Care -
Holistic integrated healthcare can also help to prevent illness by identifying potential health issues before they become serious. This approach can help to reduce the risk of chronic illnesses and improve overall health and quality of life. 

How to Find Holistic Medicine in Lake Mary and Winter Park

If you are looking for a holistic integrated healthcare provider in Lake Mary or Winter Park, there are a few options to consider. You can start by searching online for holistic healthcare providers in the area and reading reviews to find the best fit for your needs. You can also contact your local hospital or health center to see if they have any recommendations.

How to Get Started with Holistic Integrated Healthcare

If you are interested in holistic integrated healthcare, the first step is to find a provider who is right for you. At
[Caya Health](https://www.cayahealth.com) we have assembled a growing range of services and helpful tools and therapies to help you succeed in your health goals. These include [family medicine](/Family-Medicine-Services), [psychiatry](/Family-Medicine-Services), and [counseling](/Family-Medicine-Services). There are workshops and [support groups](/newpage) that you can join as well as products such as nutritional supplements and other resources to help you lead a healthier, happier life.  Call us at
[407-559-7011](tel:407-559-7011)to schedule a consultation at one of our two convenient locations.

## Unlocking the Benefits of Integrative Medicine: A Holistic Approach to Health

# Unlocking the Benefits of Integrative Medicine: A Holistic Approach to Health

**Unlocking the Benefits of Integrative Medicine: A Holistic Approach to Health**

*Integrative medicine combines conventional medical treatments with complementary and alternative therapies to promote overall well-being. Dr. Norma Roche, an expert in family, aesthetic, and integrative medicine, shares insights on the principles and benefits of integrative medicine, offering guidance on how it can optimize health outcomes.*

**Q: What is integrative medicine, and how does it differ from conventional medicine?**

A: Integrative medicine is a holistic approach that combines conventional medical practices with evidence-based complementary therapies. It focuses on treating the whole person, not just the disease, by addressing physical, emotional, mental, social, and spiritual aspects of health. Unlike conventional medicine, which often emphasizes symptom management, integrative medicine aims to uncover the root causes of illness and promote healing from within.

**Q: What are the key principles of integrative medicine?**

A: Integrative medicine is guided by several core principles:

**Q: What are the benefits of integrative medicine for patients?**

A: Integrative medicine offers several benefits:

**Q: How can integrative medicine complement conventional treatments?**

A: Integrative medicine can work alongside conventional treatments to enhance their effectiveness and reduce side effects. For example, acupuncture and massage therapy may help manage pain and improve recovery after surgery. Nutrition counseling and mind-body techniques can support patients undergoing cancer treatments by boosting immune function and reducing stress.

**Q: Who can benefit from integrative medicine?**

A: Integrative medicine is beneficial for individuals seeking a proactive approach to health and wellness, as well as those with chronic conditions such as diabetes, cardiovascular disease, autoimmune disorders, and chronic pain. It can also support mental health and emotional well-being, offering strategies to manage stress, anxiety, and depression.

**Q: How can patients incorporate integrative medicine into their health care routine?**

A: Patients interested in integrative medicine should start by consulting with a healthcare provider who specializes in this approach. Together, they can develop a personalized treatment plan that may include a combination of conventional therapies and complementary treatments. Patients are encouraged to actively participate in their health care journey and explore therapies that resonate with their goals and values.

**Q: What role does lifestyle play in integrative medicine?**

A: Lifestyle factors such as diet, exercise, sleep, stress management, and social support are integral to integrative medicine. Providers often emphasize the importance of adopting healthy habits that promote overall well-being and disease prevention. By making positive lifestyle changes, patients can optimize the benefits of integrative medicine and enhance their quality of life.

# The Benefits of Integrative Wellness With A Holistic Approach

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201024%20683'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://serenitywellnessandcounseling.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/appointment-psychologist-1024x683.jpg)

At Serenity Wellness & Counseling, we believe in and practice Integrative wellness with a holistic approach. I recognize that many people may not know what this means, so I’m providing some background and history. The most important thing to know is that Integrative wellness considers *all* components of an individual’s life: physical, mental, emotional health, and takes into consideration interpersonal relationships.

The field of integrative medicine began back in the 1960s, yet it wasn’t until 1995 that Integrative Wellness became recognized as a direction for modern medicine. Andrew Weil, MD, a visionary physician, and author, is considered “the father” of integrative medicine as a specialty. His ideas about the treatment and care of the whole person integrate scientifically validated therapies of conventional medicine with select practices derived from areas sometimes considered to be complementary and alternative medicine (CAM). From the beginning, Dr. Weil’s’ defining principles of integrative medicine include:

## The Brain’s Role In Integrative Wellness

Each year more information about the brain comes to light and the important role it has in health and wellness.  Brain health is a critical piece of overall health. It underlies the ability to communicate, make decisions, problem-solve, and live a productive and useful life. Because the brain controls so much of daily function, it is arguably the single most valuable organ in the human body. Mental illness continues to come to the foreground as more celebrities and public figures struggle with the various manifestations of the illness. The stresses of daily living contribute to affect our mental health or lack thereof. The pandemic showed how stress can affect even the most mentally sound people.

## Advanced Technologies And Methods

At Serenity Wellness & Counseling we use a wide variety of methods and technologies to help our clients in their healing journey. We work with patients who exhibit post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD), anxiety, depression, ADHD, and more employing some of the most current and advanced treatments including Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing (EMDR), LENS Neurofeedback, Cognitive Therapy. In addition, we employ meditation, yoga, nutritional psychiatry, music therapy, and more.

Anyone who wants to approach healthcare holistically can benefit from the integrative approach we engage in at Serenity Wellness & Counseling. The human body is an amazing self-healing system that benefits from care that is applied depending on the individual needs of each person. If you are ready to feel. Better and begin your healing journey, you can call me at 281-944-SWCC for a free 15-minute phone consultation. I look forward to working with you.

--- SOURCE 5: Six benefits of integrative medicine | HonorHealth ---
URL: https://www.honorhealth.com/healthy-living/six-benefits-integrative-medicine

SUMMARY:
The focus of integrative medicine is on nutrition, exercise, stress management, sleep and incorporating evidence-based supplements as well as holistic

FULL CONTENT:
# Six benefits of integrative medicine

### Health and wellness

Integrative medicine uses a whole-person approach to healthcare that looks at all aspects of a person’s life, combining conventional and evidence-based therapies. This method is particularly fitting for disease prevention and treating chronic conditions like diabetes or heart disease that are sensitive to both diet and lifestyle. The focus of integrative medicine is on nutrition, exercise, stress management, sleep and incorporating evidence-based supplements as well as holistic treatments like hypnosis or acupuncture. We spoke with [Shad Marvasti, MD, MPH](/physicians/farshad-dr-shad-fani-marvasti "Shad Marvasti, MD, MPH"), who gave us some insights into the benefits.

## 1. Offers natural, less invasive treatments

Prescription medications are often appropriate and necessary; however, for some, they may not be completely effective or have serious side effects. Integrative medicine offers natural approaches for addressing health and medical concerns, and it emphasizes minimally invasive treatments whenever possible. “I like to describe integrative medicine as a ‘marriage’ between conventional medicine and complementary (alternative) medicine,” says Dr. Marvasti. “It blends traditional medicine with safe, evidence-based alternative medicine while reinforcing your body’s innate ability to heal itself. As we improve your ability to optimize your diet and lifestyle, we often end up deprescribing medications.”

![HonorHealth offers integrative medicine services](/sites/default/files/styles/large/public/2021-10/honorhealth-integrative-medicine.jpg?itok=_DHaJxa9)

## 2. Improves your health and well-being

Integrative medicine places emphasis on promoting health and well-being as well as illness prevention through healthy living. It strives to prevent disease. This translates to fewer medications, visits to your doctor and hospitalizations.

## 3. Treats the person, not just the symptom or disease

Integrative medicine treats the whole person, not just the symptom or disease. It takes into consideration all factors that influence your health: Biological, behavioral, psychosocial and environmental. To be truly healthy requires not only physical but also emotional, mental and spiritual well-being.

## 4. Addresses the root cause of disease

Integrative medicine supports optimal health because it addresses the root cause of disease. Instead of simply treating symptoms with medications, sometimes it is more important to look deeper at what else is going on. The goal is to empower you with the tools you need to optimize your health. This may include looking into gut health, mental health, physical strength, nutritional health and even examining sources of stress to manage them effectively.

## 5. Focuses on you and your needs

Integrative medicine is personalized medicine made especially for you, meaning your care is centered around you and your needs. Your physician spends time and works in collaboration with you to consider all the appropriate remedies. “It’s not just a pill for an ill,” states Dr. Marvasti.

## 6. Incorporates Eastern medicine

Herbs and botanicals have been used medicinally for thousands of years in Eastern medicine, even before pharmaceuticals were invented. “With this approach we are combining ancient empirical traditions with modern scientific knowledge, this is really a full-circle, inclusive approach to health and healing,” says Dr. Marvasti.

![](/sites/default/files/styles/physician_profile/public/physicians/1073846762.jpg?itok=blwD1C0A)

### [Farshad (Dr. Shad) Fani Marvasti, MD](/physicians/farshad-dr-shad-fani-marvasti)

DESCRIPTION: A diagram illustrating the principles of integrative medicine, emphasizing a holistic approach that combines client and practitioner collaboration, self-care, mind, body and spirit connection, natural therapies, wellness, and addressing individual needs.

IMAGE 3:
URL: https://www.itcim.org/obr/kniha/integrative-medicine.jpg
DESCRIPTION: The image features a central box labeled "INTEGRATIVE MEDICINE" surrounded by six color-coded points highlighting key benefits, such as focusing on a person in their complexity, strengthening patient responsibility, emphasizing prevention and healthy lifestyle, promoting self-healing, building doctor-patient relationships, and encouraging an integrative, holistic approach to healthcare.

IMAGE 4:
URL: https://images.everydayhealth.com/images/healthy-living/alternative-health/alternative-complementary-integrative-health-graphic-1000x1000.jpg?sfvrsn=71502dcf_3
DESCRIPTION: The image displays four categories of holistic strategies in integrative medicine—nutritional, psychological, physical, and combinations—each with a list of practices such as herbs, meditation, acupuncture, and yoga.

IMAGE 5:
URL: https://cdn-images-1.medium.com/max/1600/1*_LOcPLRmKIcqRZt4wXPc6g.png
DESCRIPTION: A circular diagram with interconnected segments labeled Western Medicine, Functional Medicine, Naturopathic Medicine, Holistic Medicine, Regenerative Medicine, Osteopathic Medicine, and Allopathic Medicine surrounds a central emphasis on Integrative Medicine against a blurred green background.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

enriched_points.expanded_content: Integrative medicine investigates underlying health issues, aiming to identify and treat root causes rather than merely alleviating symptoms, fostering long-term wellness.
By combining conventional and complementary therapies, integrative medicine improves overall health, leading to better patient outcomes, reduced hospital visits, and enhanced quality of life.
Integrative medicine creates a supportive atmosphere, encouraging patient engagement and collaboration in their healthcare journey, fostering emotional, mental, and spiritual well-being.
